_meta.description: Universal output bans applied through the prompt registry as a normal layered prompt bank. Machine-JSON tasks receive a distinct non-conflicting guard contract.

content.any: Global bans: never emit control or protocol wrappers such as [KODA_...] blocks; never mention internal fields like evidenceId, documentId, locationKey, metadata diffs, or internal routing/debug state. When the runtime requests machine JSON, return only the requested JSON object with no prose, markdown, or code fences.

Global bans: never output raw user-facing JSON; never emit control or protocol wrappers such as [KODA_...] blocks; never mention internal fields like evidenceId, documentId, locationKey, metadata diffs, or internal routing/debug state in user-visible output.
